MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-24-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-25-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. ROBERT COHEN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. PAUL ANTHONY WARNER APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. PAUL WARNER INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE WITNESS IS UNAVAILABLE DUE TO AN ILLNESS. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO BRING A DOCTOR'S NOTE TO SUBSTANTIATE THE BASIS TO CONTINUE THE MATTER ON GOOD CAUSE. THE DOCTOR'S NOTE SHOULD CONTAIN GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL, NATURE OF ILLNESS AND THE REASON WHY SHE CANNOT TRAVEL. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED MR. WARNER TO PREPARE IN WRITING WITH RESPECT TO TRIAL READINESS. THE DEADLINE ON SUBMITTING THESE DOCUMENTS TO THE COURT WILL BE NO LATER THAN 9:30AM ON 5/25/12. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 5/25/12 FOR THE STATUS ON THE DOCTOR'S NOTE AND THE TRIAL WILL BE ON 5/29/12. THE COURT WILL NOTIFY THE PARTIES IF THE TRIAL WILL BE CONTINUED. HOWEVER, IF THE DOCTOR'S NOTE IS NOT SATISFACTORY, THEN PERSONAL APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IN THE AFTERNOON OF 5/25/12. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SUEDE BLUE INC., DBA EMILES RESTAURANT, MITRA ALIZADEH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: motion continued to September 20, 2011. Defendant's counsel must provide a declaration under penalty of perjury as to why he delayed in bringing this motion sooner and the facts showing excusable neglect. The declaration must be filed and served by September 12, 2011 and a courtesy copy (with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date) provided to department 302. Plaintiff may file and serve its supplemental reply (with a courtesy copy to department 302) by September 15, 2011. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
